name: Resort / destination fee
summary: Mandatory lodging fee added at checkout purportedly for resort amenities.

evidence.claim: FTC Junk Fees Rule (effective May 12, 2025) requires short-term lodging to include resort fees in the advertised Total Price.

body.canonicalName: Resort fee (destination fee, amenity fee, facility fee)
body.description: Mandatory surcharge added to hotel bookings purportedly for amenities (Wi-Fi, pool, gym, newspapers) often priced $20-50/night. Explicitly covered by the FTC Junk Fees Rule's short-term-lodging scope (E1); must now be included in the advertised Total Price.

disclosureLegality.requirement: Must be included in Total Price since May 12, 2025 (E1).

negotiability.script: I see a resort fee on my booking. I don't intend to use [Wi-Fi / pool / gym]. Would you waive the fee, or itemize which services it covers?
